sentences.text: Thank you for calling sandal Wood management at any time during this message you may dial your party's, three, digit extension or press seven to dial by first name to better direct your call. Please listen to the following menu options for after hours emergencies press one for apartment community management press three for office and commercial leasing press four for office and commercial maintenance press five for accounting and human resources press six to dial a person by first name press seven more information on our enter first name and pound. Press one to select Deborah Schneider. Hello, you've reached Deborah Schneider with Sandra Ward management. Please leave me a message after the tone. Thank you.
six four seven two four two eight zero. Thank you.
